title: Just a Boy
caption: His name was Dev. He was fourteen. His nani was sick, and he wanted to grow something she'd recognize from home. He didn't know the seeds were irreplaceable. He thought the garden was for everyone. He wasn't a thief. He was just a boy who loved his grandmother.
story_notes: Dev is introduced. 14 years old, quiet, good-hearted. His grandmother is unwell and he wanted to grow something for her. He had no idea the seeds were rare or that they belonged to anyone.
